# LEZAC state-2 runtime frame oracle fixture v1
# Synthetic parser fixture: verifies transcript parsing and address math only.
capture=state2_death_frame_table
source=dosbox-debug
temp_copy=1
command=dosbox-debug -c "mount c /tmp/lezac-dosbox" -c "c:" -c "LEZAC.EXE"

runtime_cs=1A2B
runtime_ds=2B3C

break ghidra=1000:3108 runtime=1A2B:3108 label=state2_death_helper
break ghidra=1000:6148 runtime=1A2B:6148 label=actor_frame_consumer
break ghidra=1000:7C89 runtime=1A2B:7C89 label=state2_countdown
break ghidra=1000:7DDF runtime=1A2B:7DDF label=state2_return_active

dump DS:0060
2B3C:0060  00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 56 00 72 79 00 00
2B3C:0070  00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00

dump DS:C4EA
2B3C:C4EA  10 18 20 00 11 18 20 00 12 18 20 00 13 18 20 00
2B3C:C4FA  14 18 20 00 15 18 20 00 16 18 20 00 17 18 20 00

dump DS:C21E
2B3C:C21E  18 00 28 00 72 00 00 00 18 00 28 00 73 00 00 00
